name: budgetsmart
description: BudgetSmart — cross-platform personal finance app (full-stack monorepo)

scripts.bootstrap: npm run setup && npm run db:setup && npm run db:seed
scripts.setup: npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix shared install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build:shared && npm --prefix backend install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix apps/web install --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix apps/marketing install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run link:shared
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run link:shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.dev:all: npm run build:shared && npm run link:shared && concurrently -n api,web,site -c cyan,magenta,green "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:web" "npm:dev:marketing"
scripts.db:seed: npm run build:shared && npm --prefix backend run db:seed
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.build:site: npm --prefix shared install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build:shared && npm --prefix apps/marketing install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run link:shared && npm --prefix apps/marketing run build
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:shared && npm run link:shared && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build && npm --prefix apps/desktop run dist
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix shared run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/marketing run typecheck
